visual_summary: A massive, fortified Martian cityscape characterized by high-rise architecture and monumental stone structures. The environment is defined by extreme verticality, featuring urban canyons and towering landmarks such as the Zodanga Barracks (1,000 ft height) and various palace towers.
layout_notes: Dense urban layout with significant vertical scale; dominated by massive barracks and palace towers creating deep canyons.
lighting: High-contrast lighting with pockets of shadow and light created by dense verticality.
constraints: Maintain massive scale relative to characters
Preserve the "heavily guarded" atmosphere through architectural density
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific material textures of the "Zodangan stone" are not detailed.
Precise layout of the palace towers in relation to the barracks is unconfirmed.
